productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: Laid back nubuck slip-on shoes from red tape have a great combination of style features. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish. Team this pair with chinos or jeans and a shirt.UpperSuede upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleSquared toe for more toe spaceElastication at the midfoot under the tongueCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortErgonomically curved and padded footbed for comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleFlexible rubber outsole grooves on the forefoot and heel for greater comfortStacked heelshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
